portal.title: Create an Account on the Voter Portal
portal.description: Visit voters.eci.gov.in or nvsp.in and create a new account using your mobile number. You'll receive an OTP for verification.
tips: Use a mobile number you have access to — OTP is mandatory.
Keep your Aadhaar number handy for faster signup.
commonErrors: Using a number already linked to another account.
Not completing OTP verification within the time limit.

portal.title: Select Form 6 – New Voter Registration
portal.description: After logging in, navigate to 'Forms' and choose 'Form 6 – Application for inclusion of name in the electoral roll'. This is for first-time voters.
tips: If you've moved from another constituency, choose Form 6A instead.
Double-check you're selecting Form 6 and not Form 8.
commonErrors: Selecting Form 8 (for corrections) instead of Form 6 (new registration).

portal.title: Fill in Personal Details
portal.description: Enter your full name, date of birth, gender, and father's/mother's/husband's name exactly as they appear on your official documents.
tips: Spelling must match your ID proof exactly.
If your name has a middle name on Aadhaar, include it.
commonErrors: Name mismatch between form and uploaded ID proof.
Entering nickname instead of official name.

portal.title: Enter Residence Details
portal.description: Provide your current residential address. The system may auto-detect your Assembly Constituency based on PIN code. Verify it is correct.
tips: Use the exact address as on your address proof document.
Cross-check the auto-assigned constituency with the CEO website.
commonErrors: Entering permanent address instead of current residence.
Wrong PIN code leading to wrong constituency assignment.

portal.title: Upload Supporting Documents
portal.description: Upload scanned copies or clear photographs of your age proof and address proof. Each file must be under 2 MB, in JPG/PDF format.
tips: Use a scanner app on your phone for clear scans.
Ensure the entire document is visible and not cropped.
commonErrors: Blurry or partially cropped document images.
Uploading files larger than the size limit.

portal.title: Preview, Declare & Submit
portal.description: Review all the details you've entered. Tick the self-declaration checkbox confirming that all information is true. Then click Submit.
tips: Take a screenshot of the confirmation page for your records.
Note down your Application Reference Number.
commonErrors: Closing the browser before the submission confirmation loads.

app.title: Download the Voter Helpline App
app.description: Install the 'Voter Helpline' app from Google Play Store or Apple App Store. It is the official ECI app for voter services.
tips: Search for 'Voter Helpline' – look for the ECI logo.
The app is free and works on Android 5.0+ and iOS 12+.
commonErrors: Downloading unofficial/fake apps with similar names.

app.title: Register / Login in the App
app.description: Open the app and register using your mobile number. Verify via OTP. If you already have an account on the Voter Portal, you can use the same credentials.
tips: Allow SMS permissions for auto-OTP reading.
commonErrors: Using a different number than the one registered on the portal.

app.title: Navigate to Form 6
app.description: From the home screen, tap 'Apply Online' → 'Form 6 – New Registration'. Fill in the same details as the portal version.
tips: The app form mirrors the portal form exactly.
commonErrors: Accidentally selecting the wrong form type.

app.title: Capture & Upload Documents
app.description: The app lets you directly capture photos of your documents using your phone camera. Ensure good lighting and no shadows.
tips: Place the document on a flat surface with good light.
Use the in-app crop tool to trim edges.
commonErrors: Blurry photos due to shaky hands.

app.title: Review & Submit via App
app.description: Preview your application, tick the declaration, and submit. You'll receive a confirmation with your reference number in the app and via SMS.
tips: Save the reference number — you'll need it to track status.
commonErrors: Poor network causing submission timeout — retry on stable Wi-Fi.
